title: # Prompt 1
content: Create a 5‑minute YouTube video script about "how to start a home garden". Include a catchy intro, three clear steps, a short personal story, and a call‑to‑action encouraging viewers to subscribe. Write in a friendly, conversational tone.

title: # Prompt 1
content: Write a 800‑word blog post about the benefits of remote work. Include an engaging hook, three clear sections with subheadings, real‑world examples, and a concluding call‑to‑action. Use a friendly, conversational tone and add a short FAQ at the end.
